rationale: GetACL is defined with InvokingID and MethodID parameters; the target call supplies only InvokingID and omits MethodID.

label: FAIL
rationale: GetACL is specified as AccessControlTableUID.GetACL; the target invokes GetACL on C_PIN instead of the AccessControl table UID.

label: FAIL
rationale: AddACE is specified as AccessControlTableUID.AddACE; the target invokes AddACE on C_PIN instead of the AccessControl table UID.

rationale: RemoveACE is specified as AccessControlTableUID.RemoveACE; the target invokes RemoveACE on C_PIN instead of the AccessControl table UID.

rationale: DeleteMethod is specified as AccessControlTableUID.DeleteMethod; the target invokes DeleteMethod on C_PIN instead of the AccessControl table UID.

label: FAIL
rationale: GetACL returns Result as an access_control_list, specifically a list of ACE uidrefs; the target returns a single string value instead of a list.

label: FAIL
rationale: AddACE returns an empty list on success, with status carrying success or failure; the target reports SUCCESS with a non-empty result list.

label: FAIL
rationale: RemoveACE returns an empty list on success, with status carrying success or failure; the target reports SUCCESS with a non-empty result list.

label: FAIL
rationale: DeleteMethod returns an empty list on success, with status carrying success or failure; the target reports SUCCESS with a non-empty result list.
